items.hook: Hunter-gatherers introduced fish to a mountain lake 7000 years ago

items.hook: Ancylomenes is a genus of shrimp, erected in 2010 to accommodate the group of species around "Periclimenes aesopius".
items.body: Members of the genus are widely distributed in the warm oceans of the world, and live in association with cnidarians; most are cleaner shrimp. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Wanganui Park Secondary College was a Government secondary college, with an enrolment of about 1,300 students from years 7 to 12, in Shepparton, Victoria.
items.body: It was amalgamated into Greater Shepparton Secondary College along with three other schools. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Why a Ukrainian cruise missile is flying with hobby drone hardware
items.body: An open-source flight-control system found in consumer drones has been installed in Ukraine’s latest cruise missile, showing how cheap technology is making military hardware accessible to all

items.hook: Mansur High school or Taleqani High School (in South Azerbaijani: منصور مدرسه‌سی, in Persian: (دبیرستان منصور is a high school located in city center of Tabriz.
items.body: A reconstruction of the main building started in 2012. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Zamia is a genus of cycad of the family Zamiaceae, native to North America from the United States throughout the West Indies, Central America, and South America as far south as Bolivia.
items.body: The genus is considered to be the most ecologically and morphologically diverse of the cycads, and is estimated to have originated about 68.3 million years ago. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Turkish invasion of Cyprus: Forces from Turkey invade Cyprus after a coup d'état, organised by the dictator of Greece, against president Makarios.
items.body: Turkey invaded Cyprus on 20 July 1974 in an operation that progressed in two phases over the following month. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: The League of Nations awards mandates of Togoland to France and Tanganyika to the United Kingdom.
items.body: The League of Nations was the first worldwide intergovernmental organisation whose principal mission was to maintain world peace. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: The Munshibari was a feudal estate in Kurigram District in the Division of Rangpur, Bengal.
items.body: It was founded in the mid-18th century by an official of the Rulers of Bengal. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Treaty of San Germano is signed at San Germano between Holy Roman Emperor Frederick II and Pope Gregory IX. A Dominican named Guala is responsible for the negotiations.
items.body: The Treaty of San Germano was signed on 23 July 1230 at San Germano, present-day Cassino, ending the War of the Keys that had begun in 1228. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: The Central Intelligence Agency releases documents under the Freedom of Information Act revealing it had engaged in mind-control experiments.
items.body: The Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) is a civilian foreign intelligence service of the federal government of the United States tasked with advancing national security through collecting and analyzing intelligence from around the world and conducting covert operations.
